errors.notSupported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser
errors.unknown: An error occurred while getting your location

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to the public transportation dashboard to monitor trips, routes, revenue, and alerts.
login.invalidCredentials: Phone number or password is incorrect.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.phoneSubtitle: Enter your Syrian phone number to receive a verification code.
reset.otpSubtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your phone number.
reset.successSubtitle: You can now log in using your new password.

errors.verifyOtpFailed: The verification code is invalid or expired.
errors.sendOtpFailed: Could not send the verification code. Please try again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Request a new OTP.
errors.resetFailed: Could not reset the password. Please try again.

validation.invalidSyrianPhone: Enter a valid Syrian mobile number.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: You must set a new password before using the system
changePassword.mustChangeMessage: Your account was created with a temporary password. Please change it to continue.
changePassword.loginAgainMessage: After changing your password, you will be signed out so you can sign in again with the new password.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.permissionDefault: Notification permission has not been selected yet.
notifications.notSupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
notifications.windowsHint: Make sure browser notifications are allowed in Windows settings.

profile.subtitle: View and update your account information

validation.max100: This field must not exceed 100 characters
validation.max50: This field must not exceed 50 characters
validation.codeNameFormat: Only English letters, numbers, hyphen, and underscore are allowed
validation.routeLineMinPoints: Select at least two points for the route
validation.min1: Value must be greater than zero
validation.selectAtLeastOneDay: Select at least one operating day
validation.endDateAfterStartDate: End date must be after start date
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as the current password
validation.invalidGtfsTime: Invalid time format. Use HH:MM:SS like 08:30:00
validation.departureAfterArrival: Departure time must be after or equal to arrival time
validation.endTimeAfterStartTime: End time must be after start time

runs.title: Daily Operations
runs.subtitle: Create and manage actual operational departures for each route
runs.noOrganizationMessage: A valid organization is required to view and manage daily operations.
runs.routesLoadError: Could not load the routes assigned to this organization.
runs.loadError: Could not load the runs for the selected date.
runs.optionsLoadError: Some driver or bus data could not be loaded. Assignment options may be incomplete.

realtime.connectionError: Could not connect to the live update service.

archive.title: Runs Archive
archive.subtitle: Browse, search and filter previous operational runs
archive.loadError: Could not load the runs archive.

empty.title: No matching runs
empty.description: No runs match the selected filters and date period.

card.assignmentMissing: A driver and bus must be assigned before confirming this run.
card.waitingForStart: This run is confirmed and ready. Waiting for the driver or bus device to start it.

assignment.title: Assign driver and bus
assignment.description: Update the assignment for the {{time}} departure heading to {{headsign}}.
assignment.driverHint: Select the driver responsible for this run.
assignment.busHint: Select the bus that will operate this run.
assignment.optionsUnavailable: At least one driver and one bus are required to complete the assignment.

confirm.missingAssignment: The run cannot be confirmed until both a driver and bus are assigned.

empty.title: No runs for this route
empty.description: Use the create route operations button to generate departures for the selected date.
empty.noRoutesDescription: At least one route must be assigned to this organization before creating daily operations.

tracking.comingSoon: Live tracking will be enabled after location and Socket support are implemented.
tracking.title: Live Tracking
tracking.invalidRun: The run or organization identifier is invalid.
tracking.waitingForLocation: Connected. Waiting for the first location update from the bus device.
tracking.mapDescription: Route path, stops and live bus position
tracking.noLiveLocation: No live bus position has been received yet
tracking.routeLoadError: Could not load the route and its stops.
tracking.runNotInProgress: This run is not currently in progress. The latest available data is displayed.
tracking.reportedValue: Value reported by the bus device
tracking.routeStopsDescription: Stop order and current bus progress
tracking.noRouteStops: No stops are assigned to this route.

toast.updateError: Could not update the run assignment

cancel.title: Cancel run
cancel.description: The {{time}} run heading to “{{headsign}}” will be cancelled.
cancel.warning: The run status will be changed to cancelled. This action cannot be reversed from the dashboard.
cancel.reasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for cancelling this run...
cancel.reasonHint: Enter a clear reason between 3 and 500 characters.

validation.reasonRequired: The cancellation reason must contain at least 3 characters.
validation.reasonTooLong: The cancellation reason must not exceed 500 characters.

trips.title: Trips
trips.subtitle: Manage trips and connect them to routes, service schedules, and buses
trips.noOrganizationMessage: A valid organization must be selected to manage its trips.

uxGuide.title: How do you start?
uxGuide.description: Create the basic trip first, then use Set Up Trip to configure stops, times, and recurring departure windows.

form.simpleModeDescription: Choose the route and service schedule, then enter the destination shown to staff and passengers.
form.requireRoutesMessage: At least one route must be assigned to this organization before creating a trip.
form.requireSchedulesMessage: At least one service schedule must exist before creating a trip.
form.routeHint: Choose the route on which this trip operates
form.noRoutes: No routes are assigned to this organization
form.scheduleHint: Choose the days and period during which the trip operates
form.headsignHint: Enter a clear destination that staff and passengers can understand
form.defaultBusHint: Optional. A different bus can be assigned later
form.defaultDriverHint: Optional. A different driver can be assigned to the run later
form.blockIdHint: Optional. Used to group trips operated by the same bus
form.advancedDescription: Operating values that staff do not normally need to change
form.setupAfterCreate: After creating the trip, use Set Up Trip to configure stops, times, and frequency windows.
form.requireDriversMessage: At least one driver must be added before creating a trip.
form.requireBusesMessage: At least one bus must be added before creating a trip.

delete.title: Delete Trip
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete “{{headsign}}”? A trip cannot be deleted while it is referenced by active operations.

toast.updateSuccess: Trip stops and times saved successfully
toast.updateError: Could not save the trip stops and times
Could not save the trip frequency windows

timePicker.description: Select the hour and minutes without typing the time manually.

setup.title: Trip Setup
setup.invalidTrip: The trip or organization information is invalid.
setup.saveDescription: Stops, times, and frequency windows will be saved as part of the trip setup.
setup.noRouteStopsTitle: No Stops Are Linked to This Route
setup.noRouteStopsDescription: Stops must be added to the route before configuring the trip stops and times.

summary.description: Review the trip details, then configure stops, times, and departure behavior.

routePlanner.title: Visual Route Planner
routePlanner.description: Select any stop to edit its times or let the bus skip it. The route appears as a metro map on desktop and a vertical timeline on mobile.
routePlanner.generatorDescription: Choose the trip start time and the average travel and dwell durations, then generate the full route schedule.
routePlanner.metroDescription: Adjust the travel duration between stops, then select a stop to edit its details.
routePlanner.timelineDescription: Select a stop card to view and edit its times and settings.
routePlanner.travelMinutes: Travel Minutes from the Previous Stop
routePlanner.stopEnabledDescription: This station will be included in the trip stop times sent to the system.
routePlanner.stopDisabledDescription: The station remains part of the route but will not be sent as a trip stop.
routePlanner.dwellMinutes: Dwell Time at the Stop in Minutes
routePlanner.advancedSettingsDescription: These settings are not required during normal operation.
routePlanner.editSavedLocally: Changes will be saved when you select Save Trip Setup.

frequency.title: Trip Frequency Windows
frequency.description: Define one or more operating periods during which the trip repeats. Each period can have a different departure interval.
frequency.confirmRemoveWindow: Click again to remove this period
frequency.repeatQuestion: Does This Trip Repeat During the Day?
frequency.repeatQuestionDescription: Enable this option when the trip departs every fixed number of minutes.
frequency.fixedTripTitle: The Trip Uses Fixed Stop Times
frequency.fixedTripDescription: No repeated departures will be generated. The saved stop times will be used.
frequency.windowsDescription: Each period can have its own start time, end time, and departure interval.
frequency.windowSubtitle: Set the operating time and departure interval
frequency.headwayDescription: Example: 10 means one departure every ten minutes.
frequency.exactTimesDescription: Generated times are treated as exact scheduled departures rather than approximate times.
frequency.windowSummaryValue: From {{start}} to {{end}}, every {{minutes}} minutes — about {{count}} departures
frequency.noWindows: Add at least one operating period.

preview.title: Departure Preview
preview.description: Choose a date to check the trip status and the departures generated from the service schedule and exceptions.
preview.unsavedTitle: The Preview Does Not Include Current Changes
preview.unsavedWarning: Save the trip setup first to include the new stops and operating windows in the preview.
preview.error: Could Not Load the Trip Preview.
preview.noDepartures: There Are No Departures on This Date.

statusDescription.allowed: The service schedule allows this trip to operate on this date.
statusDescription.forced: Exceptional service was added for this trip on this date.
statusDescription.blocked: The trip is blocked by a service schedule exception.
statusDescription.inactive: The trip or its service schedule is inactive.

validation.invalidStopTimes: Check the arrival and departure times of the stops.
validation.invalidStopOrder: A stop arrives before the previous stop departs.
validation.frequencyRequired: Add at least one operating period.
validation.invalidFrequencies: Check the times and intervals of the operating periods.
validation.overlappingFrequencies: Some operating periods overlap. Adjust their start and end times.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Manage weekly operating patterns and validity windows
schedules.noOrganizationTitle: No organization linked to this account
schedules.noOrganizationMessage: Schedules cannot be displayed because the current account is not linked to an organization. Select an organization or make sure the user is linked to one.
schedules.addDescription: Select the date and exception type, and optionally add a note explaining the reason.
schedules.listDescription: Dates where service differs from the weekly operating pattern.
schedules.emptyDescription: Add an exception to run service on an additional date or stop it on a specific date.
schedules.noNote: No note was added for this exception.

calendar.title: Schedule Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Visually manage operating schedules and exceptions through the calendar
calendar.panelDescription: Set the validity window and operating days, or select the range directly from the calendar.
calendar.rangeHelp: Select a date range on the calendar to automatically fill the start and end dates.
calendar.calendarDescription: Blue days represent weekly operating days. Exceptions appear in green or red.
calendar.usageHelp: Drag on the calendar to set the schedule start and end dates. Click any day to add an exception for that date.
calendar.selectScheduleFirst: Select a schedule first to add exceptions.
calendar.exceptionsHint: Click any day on the calendar to add an exception, or remove exceptions from the list.
calendar.createFirst: No schedules yet. You can create a new schedule from this page.
calendar.saveBeforeException: Save the schedule first before adding exceptions.
calendar.allSchedulesSubtitle: View and manage all operating schedules directly from the calendar
calendar.allSchedulesDescription: Click any schedule to edit it, or select a range on the calendar to create a new schedule.
calendar.allSchedulesHelp: Click an existing schedule to open the edit dialog. Drag on the calendar to choose a start and end date, or click a single day to create a schedule for that date.
calendar.createDialogHint: Fill in the schedule details. After saving, you can add exceptions.
calendar.saveThenAddExceptions: After saving the schedule, you will be able to add its exceptions.

form.name: Schedule Name
form.serviceCodeHint: Unique code inside the organization, e.g. WEEKDAY or RAMADAN
form.notePlaceholder: Example: Additional service for an event or suspension for a public holiday
form.noteHint: Optional, but useful for explaining the exception
form.colorHint: Choose a color to distinguish the schedule in the calendar

delete.title: Delete Schedule
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete schedule {{name}}? A schedule with active trips cannot be deleted.

delete.title: Delete Exception
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the exception recorded for {{date}}? This action cannot be undone.

buses.title: Buses
buses.subtitle: Manage organization buses and operational statuses
buses.noOrganizationTitle: No organization linked to this account
buses.noOrganizationMessage: Buses cannot be displayed because the current account is not linked to an organization. Select an organization or make sure the user is linked to one.

filters.help: Search by plate number, bus code, manufacturer, or model. You can also filter by status and type.

delete.title: Delete Bus
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete bus with plate number {{plateNumber}}? Buses currently in service cannot be deleted.

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Manage transit routes, lines, and fares
routes.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

stops.title: Manage Route Stops
stops.description: Select the stops linked to this route and set their order.

recorder.title: Route recorder
recorder.subtitle: Ride the bus, start recording, and the route path will be drawn automatically from the device movement.
recorder.routeHint: The selected route line will be replaced when you save the recording.
recorder.noRouteSelected: Select a route before saving. You can record first and select the route later.
recorder.accuracyThresholdMeters: Maximum accepted GPS error in meters
recorder.minDistanceMeters: Minimum distance between points in meters
recorder.mapDescription: The old route is shown as a dashed line, and the recorded route is shown as a solid line.
recorder.noPoints: No points have been recorded yet
recorder.saveInfo: Saving is done directly from the frontend by updating the selected route. No backend recording session is used yet.
recorder.saveDisabledRecording: Pause or finish the recording before saving the route.
recorder.permissionNote: For best results, open this page on a phone inside the bus, enable GPS, and keep the screen active during recording.
recorder.geolocationUnsupported: This browser does not support geolocation.
recorder.insecureContext: Geolocation only works on HTTPS or localhost.
recorder.rejectedPoint: The last point was ignored because its accuracy was weak: {{accuracy}} meters.
recorder.editModeHint: You can now drag route points to adjust their position, or delete extra points. The line will reconnect automatically between the remaining points.
recorder.dragPointHint: Drag this point to adjust its position on the route.

errors.permissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Enable location access from the browser settings.
errors.positionUnavailable: Could not get the current location. Make sure GPS is enabled.
errors.timeout: Location request timed out. Try again in an open area.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred while reading the location.
